strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Fullstack breadth spanning databases, APIs, frontend, and DevOps (Docker/Kubernetes)
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture advocacy
concerns: Seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior background applying to a junior/mid role
On-site requirement conflicts with candidate based in Lagos, Nigeria
Limited explicit PostgreSQL and Nest.js experience (MongoDB-heavy background)
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise with the core technologies the role requires (TypeScript, React, Node, relational/NoSQL databases) plus bonus exposure to AI/LLM tooling and Kubernetes. However, the role is explicitly entry-level with high on-site presence, while the candidate is a Staff-level engineer based in Nigeria — creating significant mismatches in seniority, compensation expectations, and location that overshadow the strong technical fit.
